heading: What I can help you with.
sub: Administrative and content-ops support for businesses that need someone reliable to keep things moving — plus video editing when you need content made, not just organized.

items.title: Email & Calendar Management
items.desc: Inbox upkeep, scheduling, and follow-ups so nothing slips through.

items.title: Data Entry & File Organization
items.desc: Clean spreadsheets and organized drives you can actually find things in later.

items.title: Internet Research
items.desc: Gathering and summarizing information into clear, usable formats.

items.title: Social Media Management
items.desc: Content calendars, scheduling, and cross-platform posting.

items.title: Document & Spreadsheet Management
items.desc: Google Workspace / Microsoft Office file handling and reporting.

items.title: Video Editing
items.desc: Premiere Pro & After Effects — for when you need content made, not just organized.

samples: Managed the content production schedule for a student organization, end to end.
Organized project files and documentation across Google Drive for team-wide access.
Created meeting notes and project timelines for a multi-person dev team.
Designed social media graphics in Canva for university event promotion.
Edited promotional videos for university events, from raw footage to publish.
note: Open to additional administrative or virtual assistant tasks beyond this list — this isn't exhaustive.
